query: Current state of Nebraska 2026 Senate race polling: Pete Ricketts vs Dan Osborn. What is the RaceToTheWH polling average, recent polls, and who is leading as of mid-2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on the Nebraska 2026 Senate race (Ricketts vs. Osborn) as of mid-July 2026:

**The race is a statistical dead heat.** Every public head-to-head poll since late 2025 has shown Ricketts and Osborn within the margin of error:
- **Tavern Research** (D-aligned, May 8–11, 2026): Osborn 47, Ricketts 42 (**Osborn +5**, 12% undecided) — the most recent poll
- **Impact Research** (Feb 2026): **Ricketts +1**
- **Lake Research Partners** (Dec 11–17, 2025): Ricketts 48, Osborn 47 (**Ricketts +1**)
- A campaign-cited "fourth major survey": 48–47 Ricketts

**Who's leading?** No poll shows a clear out-of-MOE lead. The latest poll leans slightly Osborn, but the aggregate sits within ~1–2 points of even — a genuine toss-up.

**Important caveat on your specific question:** I could **not** retrieve a live numeric RaceToTheWH polling average — their page didn't surface a figure, and aggregators (270toWin, PollsMax) render tables via JavaScript that returned no data. I've flagged this as a data gap rather than report an unverified number.

**Context:** Nebraska's deep-red structure (Trump +21 in 2024) favors Ricketts, but Osborn is competitive because he dominates independents, pulls ~17% of Trump voters, outraised Ricketts in Q1 2026, and Ricketts's favorability is underwater (~46 fav / 53 unfav). Democrat Cindy Burbank has pledged to withdraw and back Osborn, clearing the field for a two-way race.

Full findings, sources, and quantitative data points have been recorded in the structured output.

sources.title: 2026 United States Senate election in Nebraska - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Ricketts won the Republican nomination with 81.8% of the vote. Burbank defeated Forbes with 89.5%; she has pledged to drop out to support Osborn.

sources.title: Pete Ricketts' Nebraska Race Tightens as Field Clears for Osborn
sources.snippet: A Tavern Research poll released in May found Ricketts trailing Osborn 47 to 42. An Impact Research poll in February showed Ricketts leading Osborn by 1 point.

sources.title: Ricketts Has an Independent Problem in Nebraska - Tavern Research
sources.snippet: Against Osborn, Ricketts trails 42-47, with 12% undecided (May 11, 2026).

sources.title: Tavern Research poll 5/8-5/11 LV — Nebraska Senate 2026
sources.snippet: Dan Osborn 46%, Pete Ricketts 42% (incumbent), field dates 5/8-5/11 LV.

sources.title: New Independent Poll Shows Nebraska's U.S. Senate Race Tied
sources.snippet: Lake Research Partners poll, conducted Dec 11-17, released Jan 22, shows Osborn 47%, Ricketts 48%.

sources.title: NEW POLL: Dan Osborn is Tied With Pete Ricketts in Critical Nebraska Senate Race
sources.snippet: Statistical tie, 48% Ricketts / 47% Osborn; fourth major survey, all found the race tied. Ricketts favorability 46 Fav / 53 Unfav.

sources.title: Democratic-aligned poll shows Dan Osborn leading Pete Ricketts in Senate race
sources.snippet: Tavern Research shows independent Dan Osborn leading GOP Sen. Pete Ricketts by 5 percentage points.

sources.title: 2026 Nebraska Senate Forecast
sources.snippet: Last Updated July 8, 2026. Trump carried Nebraska by 21 points in 2024; Osborn's 2024 performance strongest for an independent in a Nebraska Senate contest.

sources.snippet: Aggregator page listing Osborn vs Ricketts, Burbank vs Ricketts, Forbes vs Ricketts matchups (table data JavaScript-rendered).

sources.snippet: Weighted polling average page for Osborn vs Ricketts (numeric values not retrievable via scraping).
